name: Cyngn Inc.
summary: Cyngn Inc. is an autonomous vehicle (AV) technology company focused on industrial applications. It develops DriveMod, a full-stack autonomous driving software integrated onto OEM-manufactured vehicles including tow tractors, floor scrubbers, forklifts, and tuggers. Its Enterprise Autonomy Suite (EAS) includes DriveMod plus Cyngn Insight and Cyngn Evolve tools for fleet management, analytics, and data collection. Customers include John Deere, G&J Pepsi, Coats Automotive, and USC. The company holds 24 U.S. patents and targets industrial sectors facing labor shortages and safety challenges.

products.name: DriveMod
products.description: Full-stack autonomous driving software integrated onto OEM industrial vehicles across multiple form factors.

products.name: Enterprise Autonomy Suite (EAS)
products.description: Comprehensive autonomy platform including DriveMod, Cyngn Insight, and Cyngn Evolve for fleet management and analytics.

products.name: Cyngn Insight
products.description: Fleet management and analytics tool included in the Enterprise Autonomy Suite.

products.name: Cyngn Evolve
products.description: Data collection tool included in the Enterprise Autonomy Suite for continuous improvement.

products.name: DriveMod Stockchaser
products.description: Commercially available autonomous vehicle with 6,000-lb towing capacity, first deployed with USC in 2023.

products.name: DriveMod Forklift
products.description: Autonomous forklift developed in partnership with BYD, launched as part of Cyngn's vehicle portfolio.

products.name: DriveMod MT160 Tugger
products.description: Autonomous tugger with 12,000-lb towing capacity, commercially released in 2024 in partnership with Motrec.

partnerships.description: OEM partnership for development and integration of DriveMod on forklift vehicles.
OEM partnership for the DriveMod MT160 Tugger, commercially released in 2024.
First commercial deployment partner for the DriveMod Stockchaser in California.
